name: Coronado Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onions, chiles, oregano, tomato sauce, and broth in a 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
2. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 10 minutes. Stir after 5 minutes.
3. Add chicken; stir.
4. In a separate 2-1/2-quart greased baking dish, combine rice and sour cream.
5. Sprinkle with 1 cup Cheddar cheese. Pour the chicken mixture over the cheese.
6. Top with remaining 1 cup Cheddar cheese.
7. Cook uncovered on HIGH for 5 minutes.
Each serving provides:
499 calories
23.9 g. protein
28.8 g. fat
37.3 g. carbohydrate
1012 mg. sodium
82 mg. cholesterol
Source: MICROCOOKING WITH RICE
